---
description: 'Start a new Issue — define scope, requirements, and success criteria'
agent: 'Discuss'
---
Start a new Issue discussion.

Ask me about what I'm building, why, who for, and what's out of scope.
After we agree on requirements, create a Issue doc file using the template at 
[docs/templates/ISSUE-template.md](../templates/ISSUE-template.md).

Begin with: "Tell me about what you want to build."
